remarks: This Four-family home is located in Stamford's West Side neighborhood. Built in 1930, this multi-family property offers approximately 3,762 square feet with a mix of one- and two-bedroom units. Features include natural gas heat, public water and sewer, a full unfinished basement, and a level lot.  Conveniently located near downtown Stamford, shopping, public transportation, restaurants, and major commuter routes. This is a great opportunity for investors or buyers looking to renovate, add value, and own an income-producing multi-family property.
